name: Feynman Mode creates flashcards from suggested cards after evaluation
description: After a successful Feynman evaluation, the AI suggests 3-5 flashcard pairs. A logged-in user clicks 'Create cards' (or equivalent) to bank those cards. This test verifies the full round-trip: submit explanation → receive evaluation with suggested cards → click create → see a success confirmation. The gamification Server Action (rewardBatch) and the Supabase insert must both succeed without error.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Select any available topic from the topic selector

Type a detailed explanation of at least 80 characters into the explanation field — for example: 'Photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight, water and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen using chlorophyll in the chloroplasts.'
Click the submit / evaluate button and wait for the AI evaluation to complete (may take up to 30 seconds)
Verify the evaluation result appears — gap analysis with colored segments (green/amber/red labels) and a paraphrase are visible
Verify a section of suggested flashcard pairs is visible below the evaluation, each showing a question and an answer
Click the 'Create cards' or 'Add to deck' button to bank the suggested cards
Verify a success confirmation appears — either a toast notification, a checkmark, or a message saying cards were created — with no error message and no crash
